title: Reject fabricated Layer-1 dump; reinforce three-layer integrity; refuse performance-target tailoring on fake L1
summary: Reject operator block presented as Layer 1 Engineering Truth. Claims invent frame section, material grade card, curb/GAWR at wrong vehicle scale, powertrain CG/mass, tolerances, loads, and EPAS steering architecture that contradicts ASSERTION_EXTRACTED hydraulic recirculating-ball steering. L2/L3 built on that dump are non-authoritative. Do not accept battery chemistry/kWh/voltage tailoring until L1 honesty is restored.
key_corrections: Steering remains hydraulic recirculating ball + damper — not EPAS rack
Curb/FAWR operator values contradicted by SRC-CAND-000010 F-450 tables
MEPQ-001/006/007 unknowns remain UNKNOWN — not filled by invention
